title: Ex parte probate if no objection
doc_html:
SECTION 2. EX PARTE PROBATE OF TESTAMENTS

Art. 2881. Ex parte probate if no objection

            The court shall proceed to probate the testament ex parte, unless an objection is made.

Acts 2025, No. 34, §1.
doc_text:
SECTION 2.  EX PARTE PROBATE OF TESTAMENTS
Art. 2881.  Ex parte probate if no objection
The court shall proceed to probate the testament ex parte, unless an objection is made.
Acts 2025, No. 34, §1.
